talents.name: Arcane Subtlety
talents.description: Reduces your target's resistance to all your spells by 5 and reduces the threat caused by your Arcane spells by 20%.

talents.name: Arcane Focus
talents.description: Reduces the chance that the opponent can resist your Arcane spells by 2%.

talents.name: Improved Arcane Missiles
talents.description: Gives you a 20% chance to avoid interruption caused by damage while channeling Arcane Missiles.

talents.name: Wand Specialization
talents.description: Increases your damage with Wands by 13%.

talents.name: Magic Absorption
talents.description: Increases all resistances by 2 and causes all spells you fully resist to restore 1% of your total mana. 1 sec. cooldown. (1s cooldown)

talents.name: Arcane Concentration
talents.description: Gives you a 2% chance of entering a Clearcasting state after any damage spell hits a target. The Clearcasting state reduces the mana cost of your next damage spell by 100%. (Proc chance: 2%, 1s cooldown)

talents.name: Magic Attunement
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Amplify Magic and Dampen Magic spells by 25%.

talents.name: Arcane Impact
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Arcane Explosion and Arcane Blast spells by an additional 2%.

talents.name: Arcane Fortitude
talents.description: Increases your armor by an amount equal to 100% of your Intellect.

talents.name: Improved Mana Shield
talents.description: Decreases the mana lost per point of damage taken when Mana Shield is active by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Counterspell
talents.description: Gives your Counterspell a 50% chance to silence the target for 4 sec. (Proc chance: 50%)

talents.name: Arcane Meditation
talents.description: Allows 10% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting.

talents.name: Improved Blink
talents.description: For 4 sec after casting Blink, your chance to be hit by all attacks and spells is reduced by 13%.

talents.name: Presence of Mind
talents.description: When activated, your next Mage spell with a casting time less than 10 sec becomes an instant cast spell.

talents.name: Arcane Mind
talents.description: Increases your total Intellect by 3%.

talents.name: Prismatic Cloak
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 2%.

talents.name: Arcane Instability
talents.description: Increases your spell damage and critical strike chance by 1%.

talents.name: Arcane Potency
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of any spell cast while Clearcasting by 10%.

talents.name: Empowered Arcane Missiles
talents.description: Your Arcane Missiles spell gains an additional 15% of your bonus spell damage effects, but mana cost is increased by 2%.

talents.name: Arcane Power
talents.description: When activated, your spells deal 30% more damage while costing 30% more mana to cast. This effect lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Spell Power
talents.description: Increases critical strike damage bonus of all spells by 25%.

talents.name: Mind Mastery
talents.description: Increases spell damage by up to 5% of your total Intellect.

talents.name: Slow
talents.description: Reduces target's movement speed by 50%, increases the time between ranged attacks by 50% and increases casting time by 50%. Lasts 15 sec. Slow can only affect one target at a time.

talents.name: Improved Fireball
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Fireball spell by 0.1 sec.

talents.name: Impact
talents.description: Gives your Fire spells a 2% chance to stun the target for 2 sec. (Proc chance: 2%)

talents.name: Ignite
talents.description: Your critical strikes from Fire damage spells cause the target to burn for an additional 8% of your spell's damage over 4 sec.

talents.name: Flame Throwing
talents.description: Increases the range of your Fire spells by 3 yards.

talents.name: Improved Fire Blast
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Fire Blast spell by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Incineration
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Fire Blast and Scorch spells by 2%.

talents.name: Improved Flamestrike
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Flamestrike spell by 5%.

talents.name: Pyroblast
talents.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes 148 to 195 Fire damage and an additional 56 Fire damage over 12 sec.

talents.name: Burning Soul
talents.description: Gives your Fire spells a 35% chance to not lose casting time when you take damage and reduces the threat caused by your Fire spells by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Scorch
talents.description: Your Scorch spells have a 33% chance to cause your target to be vulnerable to Fire damage. This vulnerability increases the Fire damage dealt to your target by 3% and lasts 30 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

talents.name: Molten Shields
talents.description: Causes your Fire Ward to have a 10% chance to reflect Fire spells while active. In addition, your Molten Armor has a 50% chance to affect ranged and spell attacks.

talents.name: Master of Elements
talents.description: Your Fire and Frost spell criticals will refund 10% of their base mana cost. (9ms cooldown)

talents.name: Playing with Fire
talents.description: Increases all spell damage caused by 1% and all spell damage taken by 1%.

talents.name: Critical Mass
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Fire spells by 2%.

talents.name: Blast Wave
talents.description: A wave of flame radiates outward from the caster, damaging all enemies caught within the blast for 160 to 192 Fire damage, and Dazing them for 6 sec.

talents.name: Blazing Speed
talents.description: Gives you a 5% chance when hit by a melee or ranged attack to increase your movement speed by 50% and dispel all movement impairing effects. This effect lasts 8 sec. (Proc chance: 5%)

talents.name: Fire Power
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 2%.

talents.name: Pyromaniac
talents.description: Increases chance to critically hit and reduces the mana cost of all Fire spells by an additional 1%.

talents.name: Combustion
talents.description: When activated, this spell causes each of your Fire damage spell hits to increase your critical strike chance with Fire damage spells by 10%. This effect lasts until you have caused 3 critical strikes with Fire spells.

talents.name: Molten Fury
talents.description: Increases damage of all spells against targets with less than 20% health by 10%.

talents.name: Empowered Fireball
talents.description: Your Fireball spell gains an additional 3% of your bonus spell damage effects.

talents.name: Dragon's Breath
talents.description: Targets in a cone in front of the caster take 382 to 442 Fire damage and are Disoriented for 3 sec. Any direct damaging attack will revive targets. Turns off your attack when used.

talents.name: Frost Warding
talents.description: Increases the armor and resistances given by your Frost Armor and Ice Armor spells by 15%. In addition, gives your Frost Ward a 10% chance to reflect Frost spells and effects while active.

talents.name: Improved Frostbolt
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Frostbolt spell by 0.1 sec.

talents.name: Elemental Precision
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost and chance targets resist your Frost and Fire spells by 1%.

talents.name: Ice Shards
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Frost spells by 20%.

talents.name: Frostbite
talents.description: Gives your Chill effects a 5% chance to freeze the target for 5 sec.

talents.name: Improved Frost Nova
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Frost Nova spell by 2 sec.

talents.name: Permafrost
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Chill effects by 1 sec and reduces the target's speed by an additional 4%.

talents.name: Piercing Ice
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Frost spells by 2%.

talents.name: Icy Veins
talents.description: Hastens your spellcasting, increasing spell casting speed by 20% and gives you 100% chance to avoid interruption caused by damage while casting. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Improved Blizzard
talents.description: Adds a chill effect to your Blizzard spell. This effect lowers the target's movement speed by 30%. Lasts 1.50 sec.

talents.name: Arctic Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Frostbolt, Ice Lance and Blizzard spells and the radius of your Frost Nova and Cone of Cold spells by 10%.

talents.name: Frost Channeling
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Frost spells by 5% and reduces the threat caused by your Frost spells by 4%.

talents.name: Shatter
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of all your spells against frozen targets by 10%.

talents.name: Frozen Core
talents.description: Reduces the damage taken by Frost and Fire effects by 2%.

talents.name: Cold Snap
talents.description: When activated, this spell finishes the cooldown on all Frost spells you recently cast.

talents.name: Improved Cone of Cold
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Cone of Cold spell by 15%.

talents.name: Ice Floes
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Cone of Cold, Cold Snap, Ice Barrier and Ice Block spells by 10%.

talents.name: Winter's Chill
talents.description: Gives your Frost damage spells a 20% chance to apply the Winter's Chill effect, which increases the chance a Frost spell will critically hit the target by 2% for 15 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. (Proc chance: 20%)

talents.name: Ice Barrier
talents.description: Instantly shields you, absorbing 455 damage. Lasts 1 min. While the shield holds, spells will not be interrupted.

talents.name: Arctic Winds
talents.description: Increases all Frost damage you cause by 1% and reduces the chance melee and ranged attacks will hit you by 1%.

talents.name: Empowered Frostbolt
talents.description: Your Frostbolt spell gains an additional 2% of your bonus spell damage effects and an additional 1% chance to critically strike.

talents.name: Summon Water Elemental
talents.description: Summon a Water Elemental to fight for the caster for 45 sec.
